title: Business Strategies

vocabulary.meaning: a result or goal you want to reach
a plan for how money will be spent
to put money into something to get a future return
to make a business grow larger
working well without wasting time or money

questions: Why do companies need a business strategy?
Do individual people need business strategies? Why or why not?
Do you know of any company's business strategy?
What do you think is important in a business strategy?
Can you name any mistakes small businesses make concerning their business strategies?
